name: showTrueFalseQuestion
description: Display one standalone conceptual true-or-false understanding check. It must be understandable without any code/example card and must not name or point to a concrete example, function, identifier, object, field, output, mutation, invariant, or assumption from it. Rewrite example-specific drafts as transferable principles before calling this tool. Then speak the supplied statement exactly.

parameters.description: Only a standalone conceptual statement answerable without seeing or remembering a concrete example. Never begin or end with True or false. No example references, implementation details, lead-in, hint, answer, or explanation.
